name: Tandoori Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the skin off chicken pieces.
2. Make several cuts into each piece.
3. Wash off clean with paper towel.
4. Mix vegetable oil, food color, all spices, and onion (if desired) into yogurt.
5. Marinate chicken with the mixture for 4 or 5 hours, overnight for best results.
6. Bake chicken at 400 degrees for 30 minutes. No need to preheat the oven.
7. Keep basting with juice occasionally.
8. If there is excess juice, spoon it out some.
9. Broil chicken for 2 to 5 minutes toward the end.
10. Sprinkle with Garam Masala.
11. Garnish with lemon slices and a few leaves of cilantro (optional).
